programme.title: The Case: The Fugitive (Estelle Vaucher-Grondin)
programme.desc: Estelle Vaucher-Grondin, a gendarmerie investigator, explores leads that may allow her to find Félicien Kabouga, accused of being the financier of the Rwandan genocide.

programme.title: The Case: Deadly Insurance
programme.desc: A drawer affair where women multiply around a modern bluebeard.

programme.title: The Case: Deadly Rumour
programme.desc: It isn't his first crime scene, yet six years later it will continue to haunt him.

programme.title: The Case: A French Cold Case
programme.desc: The murder of 16-year-old schoolgirl Christelle Maillery, committed at Le Creusot in 1986.

programme.title: The Case: A Crime Too Perfect (Stephane Fournier)
programme.desc: It all started on the night of February 26 to 27, 2012. It was half past midnight when Stéphane Fournier arrived at the forest of Saint Lambert des Bois.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Lady Killer
programme.desc: Investigators find the parallels between the two cases troubling: two young, isolated and vulnerable Guyanese women, two deaths in strange circumstances, two life insurance policies. Will Mohammed Khan escape justice again?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Incorrible
programme.desc: The story of a young girl savagely beaten by a group of teenagers and later found dead in a river leads to a troubling inquiry whereby water causes several complications as well as the solution to the case.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.
programme.sub-title: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Landslides
programme.desc: Nothing can be done to prevent a landslide once it starts; they are among the most ferocious and devastating forces in nature.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Hurricanes
programme.desc: With a combination of torrential rain, powerful winds, and devastating storm surges, Hurricanes are among Mother Nature’s most calamitous natural disasters.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Volcanoes
programme.desc: Human history is littered with the stories of gigantic volcanic eruptions and the tragic fates of those who could not outrun the burning lava and poisonous gases. In our own times, volcanoes continue to cause large-scale destruction.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Heatwaves
programme.desc: Temperatures in places like Saudi Arabia routinely exceed 40 degrees Celsius with very little effect on the population. However, when the same extreme heat struck the people of Russia in 2010, it killed an estimated 56,000 people.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Fatal Forecast: Hurricanes
programme.desc: Exploring hurricane devastation, scientists collect data for improved forecasting, saving lives and minimizing damage.

programme.title: Fatal Forecast: Droughts
programme.desc: This episode delves into drought impacts, often overlooked, and scientists' efforts to mitigate worldwide drought damage.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Venezuela Lightning
programme.desc: Gas from Catatumbo swamps mixed with cold air from the Andes create a perpetual lightning storm on South America's largest lake. From here George canoes 84 km to world's highest waterfall, swims with piranhas and holds a huge Anaconda.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Weather Season
programme.desc: 2005 seemed to be the year that Earth went wild. Follow George as he brings us back to the site of his hairiest adventures from that year.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Boiling Lake
programme.desc: Tucked away, high in the mountains of the Caribbean island of Dominica lies a marvel of nature  a lake whose water literally boils and steams like a witch's cauldron.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Desert Monsoon
programme.desc: Enlisting the help of fellow storm chaser R.J. Evans, George heads to Arizona to photograph spectacular lightning storms triggered by the desert monsoon season. R.J. however is known as "America's noisiest athiest" for his free-thought radio show.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Most people's idea of a dream wedding might include a horse drawn carriage and an elaborate ceremony. Not George. Join him as he and his bride to be tie the knot in an unusual and certainly exotic way.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Under Pressure
programme.desc: After submarine exploration of Grand Cayman Island, George dives with Canadian Armed Forces' experimental deep pressure unit. With explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuytten he investigates newly discovered "Black Smoker" deep sea vents.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fire And Water
programme.desc: It's the intense summer wildfires that often plague the area during their 24 hours of daylight. He travels by train, bike, plane and whitewater raft to reach the fires but Mother Nature has other plans for him and doesn't make things easy.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of Tornado
programme.desc: Tornados are one of the most destructive forces of the planets with winds at 300 miles an hour. They can destroy buildings and hurl cars hundreds of feet through the air.

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Naked Science: Venus
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Saggy Skinned Frog
programme.desc: Nick takes on his biggest frogging challenge yet – a giant frog that lives underwater in one of the highest lakes in the world – Lake Titicaca. This is Nick's most dangerous Weird Creatures mission.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Croc From Mars
programme.desc: Gharial are about the most endangered, species of crocodile on earth. Nick sets out to discover how their body design works for them, and what humans are doing to save the Gharial from extinction.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: The Real Gremlin
programme.desc: The huge eyed Tarsiers of the Suluwesi rainforest are famed for their ferocious hunting skills. A killing machine it may be, it is also a bit of a Romeo that sings to its lovers across the jungle.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Horseshoe Crab
programme.desc: The horseshoe crab has been around for nearly half a billion years, making it one of the oldest creatures on the planet. Nick wants to find out what the living fossil has been doing right for so long.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Star-Nosed Mole
programme.desc: In the boreal forest of Manitoba, Canada, Nick goes trapping for the fastest nose in natural history – the Star-nosed Mole.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Worm Lizard
programme.desc: Nick Baker is on a road trip along Mexico's Highway Number 1 running the length of the weird and wonderful Baja peninsula. His aim- to track down Bipes biporus, aka the Five-toed Worm Lizard.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: The Invisible Lizard
programme.desc: Nick’s on the chase through Madagascar. His quarry are Chameleons and Nick needs to find an invisible one to bust a few myths and uncover the remarkable mysteries about this king of lizards.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Giant Anteater
programme.desc: Luck is on Nick's side as he goes in search of the awkward middle child of anteaters, the tamandua. Borrowing characteristics from its brothers, the tamandua appears to have an identity crisis.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: The Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Nick joins the Cajun trappers of the Southern Bayou in search of a 200lb monster snapping turtle. Finding one is only the first hurdle, now he must test creature’s awesome jaws and biting power.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Blood Squirting Lizard
programme.desc: Nick heads to cowboy country, southeast Arizona, in search of the horned lizard – a reptile with an amazing trick up its spiny sleeve.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: The Human Fish
programme.desc: Deep in the subterranean world of the Slovenian Karst, Nick is in search of the Proteus. Legends persist in Slovenia that these creatures are in fact baby dragons.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: The Mimic Octopus
programme.desc: Nick drops into one of the most bizarre dive sites in the world, in search of a very convincing disguise artist - the mimic octopus, capable of an incredible repertoire of 15 impersonations.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Pink Fairy Armadillo
programme.desc: Nick goes looking for the world's smallest armadillo, it lives in the sandy dunes of Western Argentina, and is very rarely seen even by those who live there.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Axolotl
programme.desc: Mexico City might seem an unlikely place to find one of nature's most extraordinary amphibians; the Axolotl, an almost magical salamander that Nick Baker has kept in captivity for two decades.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Leafy Sea Dragon
programme.desc: In the warm waters of South Australia Nick meets a marine animal with a jewel-like body that resembles a brilliant plastic toy rather than a fish; the Leafy Sea Dragon.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: The Hellbender
programme.desc: The giant Hellbender Salamander look as if they’ve been singled out for a beating with the ugly stick. But beauty is in the eye of the beholder and Nick loves these bizarre animals.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Basking Shark
programme.desc: A monster lurks just off the holiday beaches of Britain's west coast. The basking shark is the second biggest fish in the sea, and the UK is one of the best places to see them.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Amazonian Vampire Fish
programme.desc: A blood-sucking vampire lives in the waters of the Amazon, one with a macabre reputation. The candiru is a tiny catfish that has been known to swim up the human urethra.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The 'Cuda has a Challenger
programme.desc: After years of lockdown the Ghoulz are back at SEMA! But first they need to finish the tribute 1970 Dodge T/A Challenger. This gorgeous custom build is outfitted in the Graveyard's inimitable OEM style.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Is That a Freckle?
programme.desc: Fresh from the flight and still exhausted from the SEMA show in Las Vegas Mark and the Ghoulz get back to the grind. Will eagerly prepares to paint his very first 1970 AAR 'Cuda.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Thunder from Down Under
programme.desc: When the local junkyard closes its doors Mark and Dougie have to rescue an old friend from the earliest days of Graveyard Carz. But their journey appears to be cursed by a sudden increase in thunder and lightning.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: This is a Crack Up!
programme.desc: The team takes on the biggest engine challenge of their lives! A numbers matching 383 for a 1971 'Cuda that has multiple massive freeze cracks in the block. Mark puts a local shop to the test as they attempt to save an engine.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: A Reynolds 'Cuda Reunion
programme.desc: When Tony D'Agostino makes another trip to the west coast Mark Worman takes the opportunity to revisit the Brothers Car Collection in Salem Oregon to do a deep dive on a 1971 Hemi 'Cuda that shares history with the Sandwich Man himself.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: One for the Road Movie
programme.desc: The Vanishing Point Challenger has not disappeared from view. After years of gathering rust in the Graveyard this 1970 Alpine White Challenger R/T tribute car has been cleaned up and has received most of its sheet metal.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: More than a Number
programme.desc: Tune in to the season finale of Graveyard Carz and find out what made this season one for the record books! On this special episode Mark and the Ghoulz count and catalog every significant restoration from the very first 1970 Road Runner in season 1

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Camaro Cash-In
programme.desc: Charles and Trey stumble across a 1970 Z28 Chevrolet Camaro deep in the bayou in major need of restoration. If Charles can authenticate and fix this once sought after machine, he could be looking at a lot of money.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Voodoo Demon
programme.desc: Charles and Trey happen across a rare 1972 Dodge Demon driving through the streets of New Orleans. After snagging it for $2,500 they have just one week to transform it into the ultimate 1970's street machine.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: The Ballad of El Camino
programme.desc: After haggling down to a pretty reasonable price, Trey and Charles fight to bring a trashed up collectors dream back to life--a 1968 Chevy El Camino. On top of already being ridden with rust, the team must also find a way to turn a profit.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Heavy Chevy
programme.desc: Charles and Trey are hired to fix local legend and rock star Pepper Keenan's 1955 Chevrolet. In an effort to build business, they take on the challenge of rebuilding the engine to crank out 400+ horsepower for only $17,000.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Big Easy Bandit
programme.desc: Charles and Trey find their new project in a Pontiac Firebird Trans Am in their pal's junkyard. After further research Charles finds out it's a rare Trans Am referred to as the "Bandit Edition".

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: The Wild One
programme.desc: Charles and Trey head to a farm just outside of town to purchased their latest project--a run down 1967 Ford Mustang. After discovering its rarity, they must decide whether to take it back to stock or soup it up.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Po' Boy Pantera
programme.desc: The Bomb Factory has an opportunity to buy an extremely rare exotic muscle car. Since the asking price is too much, they go in on the car with a financial backer.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Mission Commission
programme.desc: After chasing it for an entire year, Charles finally finds and buys the classy 1962 Chrysler 300 he's been dreaming of. He and his team now face the challenge of having only ten days to give it the period correct customization.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Bet on the 'Vette
programme.desc: In an eerie abandoned warehouse, Charles discovers more than just ghosts--hidden in a damp corner, under a sheet, he finds a sleek, 1959 Chevrolet Corvette.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Maverick Mojo
programme.desc: When Charles and Trey snag a 1970 Ford Maverick Grabber along with a parts car, they're bringing in something a little more personal.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: The Franken-Fury
programme.desc: After a local lawyer informs Charles and Trey of an estate sale, they race over to find a rare 1968 Plymouth Fury 3. Because the Fury was seen simply as a conventional 60's family vehicle, it was overlooked by many vintage car collectors.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Get My Goat
programme.desc: With the business of the Bomb Factory growing, the team is hired by a man who is looking to create the car of his childhood dreams--a 1967 Pontiac GTO capable of going 0-60 mph in under 5 seconds.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Bayou Bronco
programme.desc: Charles and Trey get a call from a man deep in the Bayou looking to unload his 1971 Ford Bronco. The duo hope to revamp this pony in time for a classic car auction a few weeks away. Since Broncos aren't the typical car featured at a classic car auction.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Mystery Trike
programme.desc: Charles and Trey get a lead on a possible Ed Roth Trike, a three-wheeled monster that is motorcycle in the front and car in the back. While Trey is hesitant about the authenticity of purchase due to lack of documentation, Charles trusts his gut.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Charged Up
programme.desc: Trey and Frankie get a call about a 1974 Dodge Charger down at the used car lot. It's in pretty good shape, but with another auction only a few weeks away, the Bomb Factory will need to soup up this muscle car in record time.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Crescent City Cuda
programme.desc: The guys are asked by famed car collector, Tim Wellborne, to create the "most beautiful car that never was"-- the 1970 Paint Chip 'Cuda to feature in his musclecar museum.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Elephant In A '69
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: From Roadrunner to Superbird
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Roaming the Restorations
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Taming a 1971 Challenger R/T
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Priviledge To Drive a '68 GTX Convertible
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.
programme.sub-title: Priviledge To Drive a '68 GTX Convertible

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Needs A Maw
programme.desc: Jed visits the bank to tell Drysdale that he plans to go back home to look for a wife. When Mrs. Fenwick visits, Drysdale decides that she would be perfect.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Get Culture
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: A Man For Elly
programme.desc: Granny loves one TV Western star, Quirt Manly, and Granny already has him set up for Elly May, because she knows he is probably the only who can tame the vine-swinging girl.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Giant Jackrabbit
programme.desc: A kangaroo invades the world of the Clampetts, but Granny thinks it’s a big rabbit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Girl From Home
programme.desc: An old beau shows up to marry Jethro for his money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Lafe Lingers On
programme.desc: Lafe Crick returns to the Clampett mansion looking to get rich off of Jed's money. He tries to get a job at the bank guarding Jed's money, only to get a few million of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Race For Queen
programme.desc: Bob Cummings plays himself and must judge a beauty contest.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Strike Oil
programme.desc: In the first episode Jed Clampett strikes oil, sells his land and moves to a 35 room mansion in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Getting Settled
programme.desc: When they arrive at their new mansion they are mistaken for backwoods servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Meanwhile, Back At The Cabin
programme.desc: The Clampetts find that the comforts of the mansion do not always compare with the comforts of their shack back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Meet Mrs Drysdale
programme.desc: When Mr. Drysdale describes Mrs. Drysdale as being a hypochondriac, the Clampetts assume she must be a drunk.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Buys Stock
programme.desc: When Drysdale suggest buying good stock, Jed quickly buys some cows, pigs and chickens. Meanwhile, Granny has plans to sober up Mrs. Drysdale, who the family believes is a lush.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Trick Or Treat
programme.desc: The Clampetts are feeling homesick so they decide to go visit their new neighbours. Little do they know, it is Halloween, a holiday they have never heard of.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Servants
programme.desc: Drysdale attempts another step insocial renovation of the Clampetts by lending them his servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jethro Goes To School
programme.desc: A private school teacher is shocked to learn that her new fifth grade student is Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly's First Date
programme.desc: Elly May is set up with Sonny Drysdale. When they meet, the date ends very soon, after Sonny tries to kiss Elly’s hand, but she thinks he is trying to bite her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Pygmalion And Elly
programme.desc: Sonny Drysdale plays Pygmalion and Julius Caesar as he resumes his courtship of Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Races Jethrine
programme.desc: Will Sonny propose to Elly? Can Pearl marry her daughter off? Utter confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Great Feud
programme.desc: Sonny jilts Elly and the Clampetts load their shootin’ irons for a match with the Drysdales.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Home For Christmas
programme.desc: When Granny, Uncle Jed, Elly May and Jethro decide to return to the country for the holidays, they discover airline travel.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Home for Christmas, the Clampetts help Pearl woo Mr. Brewster, a big oil company executive.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Rescues Pearl
programme.desc: Pearl attempts to snag Mr. Brewster until he makes a ridiculous public announcement.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Back To Californy
programme.desc: Jed is confronted with too many cooks when he invites Pearl and Jethrine to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed's Dilemma
programme.desc: Jed takes the family on a sight seeing tour of Beverly Hills to cool a feud between Granny and Pearl.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage
programme.desc: Drysdale’s marriage is threatened when he gets a new housekeeper while his wife is away.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly's Animals
programme.desc: Police and Elly’s animals converge on the Clampett estate when Pearl starts giving yodeling lessons.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Throws A Wing Ding
programme.desc: Two of Pearl’s ardent suitors come to visit her in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Plays Solomon
programme.desc: Granny’s plan to stop Pearl’s yodeling backfires when the police come and find her still.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Duke Steals A Wife
programme.desc: Duke, Jed’s bloodhound, becomes matchmaker for his master and Mlle. Denise, a glamorous Frenchwoman.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Buys The Freeway
programme.desc: A confidence man tries to sell Jed the Hollywood Bowl and a Freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Becomes A Banker
programme.desc: Jed is made a bank vice president so he can compete in an interbank skeet shoot.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Family Tree
programme.desc: An expert on American history finds evidence that Jed’s family preceded the Mayflower to America.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Cuts The Family Tree
programme.desc: Mrs. Smith Standish is spending more time with the Clampetts, desperate to find out if the Clampetts did in fact precede the ‘Mayflower.’

programme.title: The New Frontier: Mars: Adapt Or Leave
programme.desc: As the latest successes and failures come and go Mars continues to give up her secrets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: It powers the machinery of nature; our weather, encourages and sustains life on land and at sea.

programme.title: The New Frontier: WEBB OF LIFE
programme.desc: The James Webb Space Telescope is now operational. Launched aboard an Arianne 5 the 10-billion-dollar spacecraft has deployed successfully and reached its orbit around the Sun.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Emissaries
programme.desc: Our solar system is vast, from our own star the Sun to Earth is nearly 150 million kilometers or 1 Astronomical Unit.

programme.title: Moon Shots: Inside the Lost Apollo Archive
programme.desc: The world famous Apollo missions are some of the greatest feats ever accomplished by man. With rare archive footage and unprecedented access to life on board the Apollo spacecrafts, this stunning one-hour special brings scientific history to life.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.
programme.sub-title: Shooting Gallery: Asteroids and Comets / Galactic Visions: Alien Worlds

programme.title: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: The International Space Station is undoubtedly the jewel in the crown of low Earth orbit; observation post, research lab and class room.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Shore To Shore
programme.desc: Our seafaring nature has translated well to the space age, seeking to sail out into the unknown in search of riches of one kind or another.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: With continuous observation of arth from orbit scientists have built a data set over time that reveals much about how the Earth breaths and life sustains itself on this living Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Edge of The Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe the further back in time we reach.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living In Space
programme.desc: How do astronauts cope with living in space? The unique environment, the lack of taste in their food and the smell of canned air all contribute to the stresses of living and working in space.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Proving Einstein
programme.desc: Some of the proof of Einstein’s theories had long been elusive, beyond the capabilities of technology, until now.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Hyabusa
programme.desc: The Japanese Asteroid sample return mission has reached its target and is surveying the space rock ready to dip down and take a sample.

programme.title: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: For an instrument first developed as recently as the 17th century, the telescope has travelled a long way.

programme.title: MOON SHINE
programme.desc: The International drive to return to the Moon is gathering pace, this multi- nation effort is readying to return, stay and utilise the Lunar assets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: It has fired our imaginations for millennia, Mars, the God of War and the source of Man's science fictional demise.

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Mystery of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Mystery of the Milky Way chronicles the history of telescopes, from Galileo's refractor to Newton's reflector and beyond. This episode also looks at recent missions, including the Herschel Space Observatory's examination of the Milky Wa
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Milky Way

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Ever Expanding Universe
programme.desc: The Ever-Expanding Universe investigates a battery of high-tech telescopes that are joining the Hubble Space Telescope on its quest to unlock the secrets of our universe, a cosmos almost incomprehensible in its size, age and violence.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 1
programme.desc: Between 1960 and 1972, mankind boldly went where no human had been before. Across 11 manned missions, 24 men flew to the moon and 12 walked upon its surface. This film documents Apollo 17 through the eyes of the astronauts who flew.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 2
programme.desc: In this episode, hear first hand testimonials and dialogue from the incredible men who walked on the moon. Incredible footage and photos give a unique and beautiful experience of their data collection process and journey home.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 3: Asteroids
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 6: Fermi paradox
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 1: The Solar System
programme.desc: This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see, how we can live in space and what science tells us about the past and the future as we journey inside out of space.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 5: Space Missions
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Crystal Skulls
programme.desc: It is 2020 and the apocalypse is inevitable. 12 of 13 Crystal skulls are united causing catastrophic events. Only the 13th Skull can theoretically restore order before the Earth is destroyed from within by their power.

programme.title: Redline
programme.desc: Starring Eddie Griffin and Nathan Phillips. With the speedometer maxed out, a group of exotic car fanatics hit the streets in hopes of winning a life-changing sum of 24 million dollars. Every rule is broken as these drivers.

programme.title: Dragon Warriors
programme.desc: An evil wizard, Lord Tensley, seeks the hand and heart of the beautiful princess. When she refuses, he locks her away and releases a deadly dragon to terrorize the land. Starring: James Marsters, Kaitlin Doubleday, Luke Perry

programme.title: Rain
programme.desc: Set in 1968, a German Shepherd enrolled by his family in a training program that will send him to serve American soldiers in Vietnam. Even when Rain is wounded, he saves many, and bonds with a soldier who learns much from this very special dog.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Ex-soldier Joseph Smith comes home from war but has been left disturbed by his experiences. Despite his intentions to start a new life, he becomes caught up in the criminal underworld, where he plots revenge on his friend's killer.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan (Taylor Lautner) discovers the parents who raised him aren't his real folks, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets that trigger events and leave him running for his life.

programme.title: The Prince
programme.desc: A former assassin is unwittingly drawn back into the life he gave up when he suspects that his daughter has been kidnapped.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang in the UK traffics Eastern Europeans and then enslaves them. The women forced into sex, the men into illegal fights. When they cross a local businessman, a war escalates.

programme.title: Bending The Rules
programme.desc: Theo Gold, the New Orleans Assistant District Attorney, is about to have the worst day of his life. Not only does his wife decide to leave him on the eve of his birthday, but he manages to lose a high-profile case.

programme.title: Secrets From Her Past
programme.desc: After witnessing a mob hit, Kate Collins fakes her death and goes into hiding. Ten years later, the unsolved crime is reopened and the mob begins to suspect Kate is still alive. With her new identity compromised Kate must find a way to end the threat…

programme.title: The Perfect Teacher
programme.desc: Starring Megan Park, David Charvet, and Boti Bliss. When spoiled, beautiful high-schooler Devon sets her sights on her handsome teacher, she won't take no for an answer - even it means putting getting his girlfriend involved.

programme.title: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: Starring Dani Kind and Michelle Stafford. When Dawna Williams' college-aged daughter goes missing, she investigates her daughter's disappearance herself, unaware that her biggest supporter is also the man who may have murdered her child.

programme.title: My Son Is Innocent
programme.desc: After a brutal nighttime rape, police investigators zero in on teenager Eric Sutter. When the victim identifies Eric as her attacker, the legal system closes in on the boy as friends, neighbors and the media turn against him.

programme.title: Lost Behind Bars
programme.desc: A woman author travels to a small Oregon town to research her latest book - the story of a crime committed by a young man who's now sitting on death row. As she digs for the facts, it soon becomes clear that the wrong person has been convicted.

programme.title: In The Electric Mist
programme.desc: Louisiana Detective Dave Robicheaux is on the hunt for a serial killer, where he encounters Hollywood star Elrod Sykes and local crime kingpin Baby Feet Balboni. As Dave gets closer to the murderer, the murderer gets closer to Dave and his family.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: As she lay dying, a woman gives the only witness to her murder her daughter's journal, implying that her attacker may also be responsible for her child's death. Before giving the journal to the police, the witness makes a copy for herself.
programme.sub-title: Mary Higgins Clark: Pretend You Don't See Her

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: An innocent girl is kidnapped and held hostage for two years causing her to develop multiple personalities and making her the number one suspect when her English professor is brutally murdered.
programme.sub-title: Mary Higgins Clark: All Around The Town

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Lisa's return to her hometown to join the local police force coincides with the release of a man, Jake, who killed her best friend 15 years earlier. Soon, people start dying mysterious deaths and the investigation points to Jake as prime suspect.
programme.sub-title: Mary Higgins Clark: Try To Remember

programme.title: Living in Fear
programme.desc: A newly married bride travels to her husband's hometown for the reading of his father's will. When she discovers that the townspeople suspect her husband of a murder committed twenty years ago, she has her doubts about the man she's committed her life to.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: Two scientists are selected to travel across the universe to the source of a distant transmission and potential life.

programme.title: Encounter
programme.desc: A group of friends uncover an otherworldly object in a rural field, which they soon discover holds greater secrets than they could imagine.

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: Taking Earth
programme.desc: The human race is thrown into chaos when an alien invasion takes place. But the aliens have arrived for a very specific reason - to find the one boy out of 7 billion people who holds the power to destroy them.

programme.title: Automata
programme.desc: Jacq Vaucan (Antonio Banderas, 'The Mask of Zorro') is an insurance agent of ROC robotics corporation who investigates cases of robots violating their primary protocols against altering themselves.

programme.title: Taking Earth
programme.desc: The human race is thrown into chaos when an alien invasion takes place. But the aliens have arrived for a very specific reason - to find the one boy out of 7 billion people who holds the power to destroy them.

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: Level 16
programme.desc: 16-year old Vivien is trapped in The Vestalis Academy, a prison-like boarding school. Reunited with Sophia who previously betrayed her, they embark on the horrifying truth behind their imprisonment.

programme.title: The Last Boy
programme.desc: The world at an end, a dying mother sends her young son on a journey to the place that grants wishes. A fantasy drama inspired by the works of the 13th Century Sufi Mystic and Poet Rumi.

programme.title: World's Wildest Encounters: Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode of the documentary series Andreas Kieling encounters the last gorillas of Africa and sets off in search of the perhaps most aggressive descendant of the dinosaurs, the saltwater crocodile in Australia.

programme.title: Wandering Wolves: Episode 1
programme.desc: For most Europeans, the wolf is more of a myth than an actual wild animal. But since the nineties, Isengrim has been making his way back to the middle of the continent.

programme.title: Wandering Wolves: Episode 2
programme.desc: In Part Two of the documentary, the wolf experts Luigi Boitani, Francesca Marucco, Ilka Reinhardt and Hubert Potocnik track the animals all the way across Europe.

programme.title: Russia's Hidden Paradises
programme.desc: Russia is one of the most diverse and by far the largest country in the world. Its immense nature has always fascinated people.

programme.title: Scotland - Highlands and Islands
programme.desc: An affectionate portrait of Scotland, with its unspoiled landscapes and unconventional inhabitants.

programme.title: Scandinavia's Hidden Paradises
programme.desc: Four spectacular regions are representative of "Scandinavia's hidden paradises": High in the north, in Swedish Lapland, mighty moose feel at home.

programme.title: Wild Germany: Coasts
programme.desc: The episode Coasts shows the magnificence of the German North Sea and Baltic Coastlines and presents unique animal footage filmed over more than five years.

programme.title: Wild Germany: Mountains
programme.desc: This episode shows unique insights into Germany’s mountain world, travelling from Saxonian Switzerland to the Palatinate Forest, from the Harz to the Alps.

programme.title: Wild Germany: Forests
programme.desc: Shrouded in myth and legend, the forests of Germany and their wild inhabitants are world famous. Forests enters a world full of magic.

programme.title: Wild Germany: Rivers and Lakes
programme.desc: Water is the beginning of all life - including the wildlife of Germany. The episode Rivers and Lakes takes the viewer on a journey through the water world of Wild Germany.

programme.title: Wild Berlin
programme.desc: Berlin is a European metropolis and home to millions of wild animals, living their lives in a fascinating parallel world as invisible companions, neighbors, sub letters or even friends.

programme.title: Wild Baltic Sea: Between Denmark and Latvia
programme.desc: From Denmark’s northernmost corner to the endless beaches of Latvia.

programme.title: Wild Baltic Sea: Between Estonia and Finland
programme.desc: A world of thousands of islands between Estonia, Sweden and Finland.

programme.title: Wild Baltic Sea: Between Finland and Sweden
programme.desc: Journey to the most unknown region of the Baltic Sea.

programme.title: Wild Iran: To the South
programme.desc: At the first part of his journey, the photographer is lucky to get some shots of rare animal species. Between the gaps of the rocky mountains he traces funny creatures: Pica.

programme.title: Wild Iran: To the North
programme.desc: Benny Rebel approaches a big cat in the semi desert with caution. An Asiatic cheetah is like an icon of Iranian nature. The carnivore accepts Benny in its closer environment.

programme.title: Wild Poland
programme.desc: From “Polands Amazonia” between Biebrza and Narew up to the mountains of the Tatra and into “Polands desert” close the Baltic Sea: “Wild Poland” is full of natural wonders.

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Fiance Sleep With My Uncle for Money?
programme.desc: Did Ray cheat on Ashley while she was pregnant with his baby and have a secret threesome? Then, is Jason's fiancé Tasha sleeping with his own uncle Sonny for money?
programme.sub-title: Did My Fiance Sleep With My Uncle for Money?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Pre-Wedding Cheating Scandals!
programme.desc: Shenik and Shenequa were united on Maury’s show last year after a DNA test. But is Shenik now sleeping with her sister’s man? Plus, the only thing that stands in the way of these couples tying the knot are their lie detector test results!

programme.title: The Maury Show: We'll Prove You're My Baby's Dad!
programme.desc: Kreisha and Jonathan's mom wants to prove to him that he fathered her baby. Plus, Brooke and Wade's relationship began as a teenage romance, but ends with a paternity test!
programme.sub-title: We'll Prove You're My Baby's Dad!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Is Cortney the father of Brittany’s kids? According to his sister, Brittany cheated with her fiancé Clifton! Later, Melissa claims that her ex-husband didn’t father her twins and Sean’s the dad! Will the DNA results confirm this?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Unlikely Sources
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written In Blood
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Shattered Vows
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Collective Justice
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Random Targets
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Deadly Smile
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Witness To Terror
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a black box.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Soldier Stories
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly intentions
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Patterns Of Guilt
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Elements Of Murder
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison. When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Burning Evidence
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Out To Kill
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.
