programme.title: On the Case: A Deadly Secret
programme.desc: A small town hair dresser is found beaten and strangled in her beauty salon. After the investigation goes cold, an act of conscience cracks the case.

programme.title: On the Case: Notes From a Killer
programme.desc: April 1st 1988. It was a cloudy afternoon when 8-year-old April Tinsley left home for a play date. Janet Tinsley never could have imagined that would be the last conversation she would ever have with her beloved daughter.

programme.title: On the Case: The East Area Rapist
programme.desc: A sexual sadist known as the East Area Rapist terrorizes California and its law enforcement officers for decades.

programme.title: On the Case: Hidden by Fire
programme.desc: When firefighters respond to a raging house fire they discover the blaze was just the cover up for a vicious murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Little Lamb
programme.desc: Investigators must identify a gunman who murdered a young mother but spared her child asleep in her car seat in the back of her minivan.

programme.title: On the Case: What Happened to Sarah
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl's mysterious runaway note raises difficult questions for police. Had she really left home on her own or had someone close to her pieced together writing from her journals to cover up an unthinkable crime.

programme.title: On the Case: Smoke and Ashes
programme.desc: A beautiful bride to be is murdered when a bomb explodes as she enters her home.

programme.title: On the Case: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: In order to solve the vicious double murder of a beloved couple, police must uncover a cold blooded killer's carefully calculated plot.

programme.title: On the Case: The Killer Rang Twice
programme.desc: Linda Donahew, of Arlington Texas, was discovered stabbed to death by her sister one night in June. For nearly two decades the case remained unsolved, until detectives matched DNA from Linda's case with another case a few hundred miles away.

programme.title: On the Case: A Mystery in Indio
programme.desc: When Wendi Brant was found brutally murdered in 1998, her estranged husband quickly became a person of interest. But he wasn't the only potential suspect, and this case would continue to baffle police for decades.

programme.title: On the Case: Gone in a Blink
programme.desc: A teenager waiting for her friends to give her a ride home from work suddenly disappears. When her friends arrive, they find terrifying evidence of her abduction.

programme.title: On the Case: A Murder in Thunderbolt
programme.desc: When a couple is shot down in front of their home in the quiet suburb of Thunderbolt, Georgia, the entire community hears the barrage of gunfire. As police sift through the evidence, they must determine if one of the neighbors is a witness or the killer.

programme.title: On the Case: One Month of Terror
programme.desc: After abducting a 17 year old girl in front of her home her kidnapper taunts the family with phone calls and disturbing letters. But a tiny mistake will eventually lead police to his door.

programme.title: On the Case: A Face with No Name
programme.desc: Police have DNA evidence and a videotape of their suspect, yet they still struggle to find a vicious killer.

programme.title: On the Case: The Ultimate Sin
programme.desc: A man's crisis of conscience unravels a decades old mystery behind a young girl's murder.

programme.title: On the Case: A Promise Kept
programme.desc: A cold-case detective reopens a decades-old murder case and promises to get justice on behalf of the victim's family.

programme.title: On the Case: Hanging By A Thread
programme.desc: Hillsborough County Florida is in the midst of a horrifying crime spree. Young women are turning up dead every week. Can one teen age girl's bravery bring an end to a vicious killer's reign of terror?

programme.title: On the Case: One of Their Own
programme.desc: The daughter of an FBI agent is abducted from the Tucson airport, where she had gone to pick up her husband. Months later, her body is found in a shallow grave, sparking what would become one of the FBI's longest homicide investigations.

programme.title: On the Case: A Mystery on Cherry Hill
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman vanishes without a trace, it may take another tragedy before police will be able to solve the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Possessed
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Brussels, Belgium in search of the sacred sundial of Zeus in order to stop the Vampires.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Memories of Montmartre
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Paris, France to find a stolen locket, so they can clear Sydney's dead grandmother of the charges.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Put Back
programme.desc: Kuba, Africa 100 AD: Worshippers of Woote curse his idol to protect it. 2000: Ross Crawford comes to Sydney, because he took the idol and the curse has accelerated his aging.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Legend of the Lost
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel set out to find if the legend of the lost civilization in New Guinea is actually true. Unfortunately, they have to team up with Derek Lloyd.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Dagger of Death
programme.desc: India, 500 A.D.: A precious dagger is used in human sacrifices to goddess Kali. Sydney must return a relic to India for her fellow hunter, who believes the dagger made him kill his assistant.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Last of the Mochicas
programme.desc: On a search for a South American Mochica Indian relic of protection, Nigel and his colleagues get captured by local guerrillas. It's up to Sydney and ally Jason Clark to save them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fertile Ground
programme.desc: Sydney reunites with her high school sweetheart to track down a Hawaiian fertility idol in Madagascar.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Gypsy Jigsaw
programme.desc: Sydney receives a deck of rare Tarot cards from her recently deceased friend. The infamous, previously unmentioned Vulture was after him. Sydney enlists Claudia to help.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E22 - Family Ties
programme.desc: With death approaching in the form of Peacekeeper search parties, those aboard Moya say their final goodbyes, and share a last feast together.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E1 - Mind The Baby
programme.desc: Crichton, Aeryn and D'argo are stranded in an asteroid field while Scorpius searches for them. Their safety depends on Crais, who is nearby in Talyn.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E1 - Mind The Baby

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E2 - Vitas Mortis
programme.desc: D'Argo takes part in a sacred ritual that helps an old Luxan, an Orican, to survive.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E3 - Taking The Stone
programme.desc: Chiana leaves Moya and goes to 'grave planet' populated by reckless thrill seekers who play dangerous and life-threatening games.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E3 - Taking The Stone

programme.title: Dark Matter: She's One of Them Now
programme.desc: Tired of playing catch up, the crew tracks down their handler, Tabor Calchek, so they can go on the offensive against the mysterious Alicia Reynaud.

programme.title: Dark Matter: Stuff to Steal, People to Kill
programme.desc: The first test run of the ship's Blink Drive goes awry, accidentally transporting The Raza to a parallel reality. With the Blink Drive damaged beyond repair, the crews' only hope is to steal the only other version in existence.
programme.sub-title: Stuff to Steal, People to Kill

programme.title: Dark Matter: Going Out Fighting
programme.desc: After collapsing in her quarters Two learns that her nanites are failing. In order to save her life, the crew of The Raza must pull off a dangerous op inside the headquarters of Dwarf Star Technologies.

programme.title: Dark Matter: Take the Shot
programme.desc: When the Android experiences a dream for the first time, she is compelled to inform the crew she may be malfunctioning. After members of the crew begin to be affected in strange ways, it becomes clear they are facing a larger threat.

programme.title: Dark Matter: Wish I'd Spaced You When I Had the Chance
programme.desc: While resupplying at a planetary outpost, Five is taken captive by a local gang of criminal brothers. Three races to locate her as the rest of the crew deal with Chief Inspector Kierken and the Galactic Authority.
programme.sub-title: Wish I'd Spaced You When I Had the Chance

programme.title: Dark Matter: Sometimes in Life You Don't Get to Choose
programme.desc: Having regained the memories of Ishida Ryo, Four is determined to reclaim the throne of Ishida. With the crew's help he uses the Blink Drive to persuade old friends to his cause.
programme.sub-title: Sometimes in Life You Don't Get to Choose

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Star Crossed (REDUX)
programme.desc: Travis and Callie are hired by the Jup-Fed to arrest Dakkota 79, a Raider leader on the verge of starting a war with the Verran Clan. Rudolfo's inquiry into a possible bounty on Travis leads to complications with his new crewmates.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Far From Home: Kyu Soo Kim
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the harrowing case of a London landlord who sadistically tortured and murdered two of his tenants.
programme.sub-title: Far From Home: Kyu Soo Kim

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen
programme.desc: In 1973, three young girls were beaten, raped and strangled over a six-week period. The Saturday Night Strangler escaped justice for almost 30 years. But new techniques in DNA technology and a midnight exhumation finally uncovered the killer.
programme.sub-title: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers: Liam
programme.desc: A father-daughter cruise comes to a disastrous end when the dad goes missing and a family is torn apart.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers: Muriel
programme.desc: When a wealthy San Francisco socialite is bludgeoned to death with a whisky bottle, a key witness on board may be able to help investigators solve the shocking murder.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers: Deanna
programme.desc: When a youth ministry attendee disappears aboard a cruise ship, detectives suspect that someone in the ministry may have something to hide.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Dunblane Massacre
programme.desc: In an emotional tribute, witnesses and victims' relatives look back on the tragic murder of 16 children and a teacher at Dunblane Primary School in Scotland, 15 years ago.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Jeremy Bamber
programme.desc: An investigation into Jeremy Bamber's brutal murder of his family in Essex, which occurred in 1985. Sentenced for life, he still maintains he is innocent. Is the right person behind bars?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Rhys Jones
programme.desc: The parents of innocent 11-year-old Rhys Jones, shot on his way home from a football club in Liverpool 2007, speak about the harrowing day when they lost their son.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Stephen Cameron
programme.desc: Gripping documentary examining the fatal stabbing of 21-year-old motorist Stephen Cameron during a motorway altercation in 1996.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos: NEW Living With A Murderer And Feared I Would Be Next
programme.desc: In 1998, a Sikh woman, Sarbjit Kaur Athwal, played witness to the arranged murder of her sister-in-law, Surjit Kaur Athwal, who was ordered to be killed by their mother-in-law, Bachan Kaur.
programme.sub-title: NEW Living With A Murderer And Feared I Would Be Next

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos: NEW My Boyfriend Murdered My Sister And Best Friend And Made Me Watch
programme.desc: In February 2012, 19-year-old Elisa Frank was forced to watch helplessly as her former lover, Ahmad Otak, ferociously stabbed both her sister Kim and best friend Samantha, before bundling Elisa into a car and driving to Dover.
programme.sub-title: NEW My Boyfriend Murdered My Sister And Best Friend And Made Me Watch

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos: NEW Two Decades Of Torture By The Woman We Called Mum
programme.desc: Dubbed as ‘Britain’s most sadistic mother’, Eunice Spry physically and mentally tortured her three adoptive children, Victoria, Alloma and Christopher, across a period of almost 20 years.
programme.sub-title: NEW Two Decades Of Torture By The Woman We Called Mum

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ann Marie Anastasi
programme.desc: Ann Marie and Anthony Anastasi had four children, a big house on a desirable street… and a younger lover living in their basement. It was a toxic love triangle, and one that was destined to end in tragedy.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Hannegret Donnelly
programme.desc: The Donnelly family’s neighbours knew they were unusual. Christopher and Hannegret were rarely seen outside the house, and the children were home-schooled. But no one could guess the violence taking place within their home - until it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chaz Higgs
programme.desc: High-profile politician Kathy Augustine married nurse Chaz Higgs after a whirlwind romance. They were an unlikely match, and when their marriage hit the rocks, Chaz decided to use his medical training to commit an undetectable crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Denise Williams
programme.desc: Denise Williams was devastated when her husband Mike disappeared on a hunting trip. He was feared drowned. But Mike’s mother Cheryl didn’t buy it, and after years of relentless campaigning, she finally uncovered the truth about her son’s death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Paul Novak
programme.desc: Paul Novak was a thrill-seeking paramedic who loved the hustle and bustle of the city. His wife Catherine was a homemaker and volunteer who preferred small town life. Unable to reconcile their differences, Paul decided to plan the perfect crime.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rachel Nickell
programme.desc: A hard-hitting look at the murder of Rachel Nickell, who was sexually assaulted and murdered in front of her two-year-old son on Wimbledon Common in 1992.

programme.title: Strangest Things: The Fake, The Spy And The Steam Powered Brain
programme.desc: How did a faked human fossil fool experts for half a century? How did a lump of wood and some bits of bent metal become one of Russia’s most dangerous weapons? Why did a Victorian genius believe he could make a steam-powered thinking machine?
programme.sub-title: The Fake, The Spy And The Steam Powered Brain

programme.title: Strangest Things: The Ice Age Shaman, The Bronze Age Sky And The Steampunk Lightbulb
programme.desc: Is the 11,000-year-old heavily worked skull of a deer, complete with eye holes, evidence of the earliest known religion? Is a Bronze Age disk covered in gold decoration the earliest representation of the cosmos?
programme.sub-title: The Ice Age Shaman, The Bronze Age Sky And The Steampunk Lightbulb

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Ancient Oland Island Massacre
programme.desc: On a Swedish island, archaeologists discover a grisly site. The wreckage of an American Navy plane is located in a surprising place. Finnish farmers unearth something shocking. A baby mammoth found in the permafrost is studied.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Paranormal Mysteries
programme.desc: Paranormal Mysteries: A woman is terrorised by an invisible attacker and a mother undergoes a violent and demonic transformation.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Medical Mysteries
programme.desc: Medical Mysteries: An adrenaline junkie and her unborn baby somehow survive when their parachute fails, and a firefighter is incinerated in his bed.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Power Of The Mind
programme.desc: Power of the Mind: A housewife has a strange and sudden vision that helps to solve a murder. A man remembers every single moment of his life.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: Ancient Mysteries: A girl finds a 1000-year-old skull that may prove aliens once walked the planet, and ancient stone carvings could rewrite the story of evolution.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Amazing Survival
programme.desc: Amazing Survival: Incredible stories of people who cheated death, including a man who escaped from the avalanche of debris caused by the collapse of the World Trade Center.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Man Beasts
programme.desc: Man Beasts: We're all fascinated by mysteries. But is the unexplained really unexplainable? William Shatner investigates in an attempt to find a logical explanation.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 11
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 10
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 9
programme.desc: We have always been told that mankind enjoys free will. Is this really true or have aliens created the means for controlling humanity?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 8
programme.desc: Take a fresh look at some classic alien encounters, UFOs and abductions, and discover several new stories.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 7
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 6
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 5
programme.desc: A look at the possibility that life began on Mars and travelled to Earth. Plus, if aliens exist, what plans do they have in store for us? Experts investigate.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 4
programme.desc: Previously sealed documents hint at compelling new theories about extraterrestrials. Could aliens be living among us? And could former US Presidents know something we don't?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 3
programme.desc: Experts investigate why so many UFO sightings take place in Los Angeles, determining that the answer may lie underwate

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 2
programme.desc: Recently-declassified FBI files cast new light on the existence of aliens, as well as question whether the Vatican could be hiding proof of extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Inca Child Sacrifice
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Family Ties: The Job Not Taken
programme.desc: Alex must choose between a friendship and his career.

programme.title: Family Ties: The Wrecker's Ball
programme.desc: Elyse races to save a building she designed from the wrecking ball.

programme.title: Family Ties: My Best Friend's Girl
programme.desc: Skippy falls for Alex's girlfriend, Lauren, when he begins counseling her.

programme.title: Family Ties: 'Til Her Daddy Takes the T-Bird Away
programme.desc: Steven refuses to co-sign on a loan for Mallory's new car.
programme.sub-title: 'Til Her Daddy Takes the T-Bird Away

programme.title: Family Ties: Simon Says
programme.desc: Jennifer is caught in the middle when she begins working with her inept friend.

programme.title: Family Ties: All in the Neighborhood - Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and Elyse face bigotry in their own backyard.

programme.title: Family Ties: All in the Neighborhood - Part 2
programme.desc: The Keatons fight against bigotry in their own neighborhood.

programme.title: Family Ties: They Can't Take That Away From Me - Part 1
programme.desc: Alex falls for someone else when Lauren leaves town.
programme.sub-title: They Can't Take That Away From Me - Part 1

programme.title: Family Ties: They Can't Take That Away From Me - Part 2
programme.desc: Alex is forced to choose between Lauren and his new love.
programme.sub-title: They Can't Take That Away From Me - Part 2

programme.title: Family Ties: Rain Forests Keep Falling on My Head
programme.desc: Jennifer becomes obsessed with protecting the environment.
programme.sub-title: Rain Forests Keep Falling on My Head

programme.title: Family Ties: Wrap Around the Clock - Part 1
programme.desc: Andy’s time capsule revives some funny family memories.

programme.title: Family Ties: Wrap Around the Clock - Part 2
programme.desc: The Keatons share a laugh when they look back at their past.

programme.title: Family Ties: Mr. Keaton Takes a Vacation
programme.desc: Steven must confront his feelings about Nick when he moves in for a week.

programme.title: Family Ties: Alex Doesn't Live Here Anymore - Part 1
programme.desc: Elyse gets upset when Alex takes a job in New York.
programme.sub-title: Alex Doesn't Live Here Anymore - Part 1

programme.title: Family Ties: Alex Doesn't Live Here Anymore - Part 2
programme.desc: Alex bids a tearful goodbye to his family before moving to New York.
programme.sub-title: Alex Doesn't Live Here Anymore - Part 2

programme.title: Family Ties: Pilot
programme.desc: Alex escorts a pretty socialite to a dance at her country club.

programme.title: Family Ties: Elyse D'Arc
programme.desc: Elyse gets so wrapped up in work that she neglects her family.

programme.title: Family Ties: I Know Jennifer's Boyfriend
programme.desc: Jennifer gets picked on when she befriends a boy at school.

programme.title: Family Ties: Not With My Sister You Don't
programme.desc: Alex heads the household when Elyse and Steven go away for the weekend.
programme.sub-title: Not With My Sister You Don't

programme.title: Family Ties: Oops
programme.desc: Mallory resents Elyse for the advice she gives her pregnant friend.

programme.title: Family Ties: Have Gun, Will Unravel
programme.desc: The Keatons consider buying a gun for protection after getting burglarized.

programme.title: Family Ties: Summer Of '82
programme.desc: Seduced by an "older woman" of twenty-one, the hitherto inexperienced Alex is devastated to learn that she thinks of their relationship as casual.

programme.title: Family Ties: I Never Killed for My Father
programme.desc: A visit from Steven's father evokes confrontation between the two.
programme.sub-title: I Never Killed for My Father

programme.title: Family Ties: No Nukes Is Good Nukes
programme.desc: To the dismay of the Keaton children and their equally conservative grandparents, Steven and Elyse take time out Thanksgiving Day to attend an anti-nuke rally-and end up spending the holiday in jail.

programme.title: Family Ties: Suzanne Takes You Down
programme.desc: Soon after freelance architect Elyse Keaton hires her friend Suzanne Davis to handle clerical chores, she wants to fire the under-qualified, overly aggressive secretary.

programme.title: Family Ties: Death Of A Grocer
programme.desc: Though Alex loves working at Mr. Adler's "Mom and Pop" grocery store, to the old man's dismay, he quits to "climb the corporate ladder" at an ultramodern supermarket.

programme.title: Family Ties: Give Your Uncle A Kiss
programme.desc: Mallory is horrified and confused when a close family friend and older business associate of her father makes a pass at her.

programme.title: Family Ties: Big Brother Is Watching
programme.desc: As the new editor of his school paper, Alex uncovers a cheating scandal and to everyone's chagrin, prints a list of students who were caught including Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: When a blizzard forces the Keatons to spend Christmas at home, Elyse's gift to Steven an album filled with fascinating old photos sparks flashbacks to the births of their three children.

programme.title: Family Ties: Sherry Baby
programme.desc: When popular sorority girl Sherry Marshall befriends Mallory to get close to Alex, Mallory brings them together in hopes of joining Pi Nu but her plan backfires.

programme.title: Family Ties: The Fugitive, Part 1
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.title: Family Ties: The Fugitive, Part 2
programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Family Ties: Margin Of Error
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Family Ties: French Lessons
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Family Ties: I Gotta Be Ming
programme.desc: As Big Brother to a 10-year-old Vietnamese boy, Alex tries to mold Ming into his own image, and he learns an unforgettable lesson when he breaks a promise to the adoring child.

programme.title: Moesha: I Know What You Did In The Third Grade
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are stalked by a student who was just released from jail who they haven’t seen since the third grade when he got into trouble because of them. Parody of Brandy’s feature 'I Still Know What You Did Last Summer…'
programme.sub-title: I Know What You Did In The Third Grade

programme.title: Moesha: A Terrible Thing Happened On My Tour Of College
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are invited to a college to attend a Prospective Freshman Weekend and someone slips a 'roofie' in her drink. Her boyfriend Aaron keeps her from being taken advantage of.
programme.sub-title: A Terrible Thing Happened On My Tour Of College

programme.title: Moesha: Birth Control
programme.desc: Moesha gets birth control pills when she decides she would like to lose her virginity to Aaron. However, things get complicated when Dee finds the pills in her purse.

programme.title: Moesha: A Class Act Christmas
programme.desc: Moesha, Hakeem, and the other employees of the Class Act are held hostage by a man dressed as Santa Claus protesting age discrimination.

programme.title: Moesha: The Crush
programme.desc: A friend of Myles who has a crush on Moesha pretends he cannot read so she can tutor him. However, after an article she writes about the success she has had with the little student is published in the LA Times, Moesha learns a hard lesson.

programme.title: Moesha: Barking Up The Wrong Tree
programme.desc: Hakeem accepts a job as assistant manager of the Class Act claiming there are financial difficulties at home. Moesha, concerned about his college education, confronts his mother who denies his claims.

programme.title: Moesha: Life Imitating Art
programme.desc: Racial tensions mount in Moesha’s high school after a mural depicting Latin American hero Caesar Chavez is purposely defaced.

programme.title: Moesha: OhMiGod, Fanatic
programme.desc: After Moesha and Kim have a huge fight, Moesha is surprised when MTV shows up at her door to film her bringing her best friend Kim to meet her favorite singer. Leanne Rimes guest stars.

programme.title: Moesha: The Rite Stuff
programme.desc: Moesha wants to boycott her debutante ball when she learns one of the girls is thrown out of the ceremony because she is pregnant.

programme.title: Moesha: I Love Moesha
programme.desc: When Moesha is once again rejected from her friends’ band, we enter a black and white parody of I LOVE LUCY wherein Lucy (Moesha) tries to get into Ricky’s show.

programme.title: Moesha: Home Is Where The Car Is
programme.desc: Moesha is disappointed when she is not appointed valedictorian of her senior class. She discovers the boy who has been appointed is homeless.
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where The Car Is

programme.title: Moesha: Girl’s Night In
programme.desc: At a slumber party, Moesha and her friends reminisce (with clips from past episodes) about the past four years together.

programme.title: Moesha: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Kim’s mother, Nikki, is re-entering a journey she started 18 years ago. With Dee’s help, she will be completing her education to receive a high school diploma.

programme.title: Moesha: Had To Be You
programme.desc: An old boyfriend of Andell’s comes back into her life and proposes to her. Moesha tries to keep Andell and Moesha’s Uncle Bernie together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Moesha: The Prom
programme.desc: Moesha’s date for the proms cancels at the last minute. She goes unescorted and meets a handsome mysterious boy who disappears at midnight. She tries to find him, but to no avail.

programme.title: Moesha: Independence Day
programme.desc: It’s Moesha’s 18th birthday, and as a surprise, her family and friends unknowingly invite all of Moesha’s past boyfriends to the party.

programme.title: Moesha: I Studied Twelve Years For This?
programme.desc: When Moesha’s car breaks down, she, Hakeem, and Niecy are late for their graduation ceremony.
programme.sub-title: I Studied Twelve Years For This?

programme.title: Moesha: Good Vibrations?
programme.desc: A frustrated Moesha longs for a promotion from 'gopher' to writer at Vibe magazine but believes that her boss, Joe Scott, would rather she pay her dues with something other than her writing talent.

programme.title: Moesha: Fired Up
programme.desc: Eager to get on the fast track at Vibe Magazine, Moesha pretends to be a reporter to land a Maya Angelou interview. But her ambition, coupled with Maya’s advice, leads Moesha down an entirely different path than she’d planned.

programme.title: Moesha: The Party’s Over (Here)
programme.desc: Unable to resist the temptations of college life, Moesha and Niecy become regulars on the party circuit, until their attendance at a late-night frat party takes its toll in more ways than one.

programme.title: Moesha: Mis-Directed Study
programme.desc: Moesha is flying high after she gets a job tutoring one of the basketball team’s star players until she finds out what kind of game he really wants to play.

programme.title: Moesha: Not My Pumpkin
programme.desc: Things get tense at the Mitchell house when Frank discovers Moesha has been taking birth control pills – and he’s the last to know.

programme.title: Moesha: Just Above My Head
programme.desc: Moesha finds her history teacher’s remarks racially offensive, but fears that confronting him might affect her grade and cost Niecy her scholarship.

programme.title: Moesha: A Den Is A Terrible Thing To Waste
programme.desc: A well-intentioned Moesha intervenes to try and stop her once-popular hangout, The Den, from being sold to a commercial developer, unaware that Andell stands to make a great deal of money on its sale.
programme.sub-title: A Den Is A Terrible Thing To Waste

programme.title: Moesha: Isn’t She Lovely?
programme.desc: Hakeem and Moesha’s friendship takes an interesting turn after he surprises her with an expensive necklace to wear to a homecoming dance she’s attending with someone else.

programme.title: Moesha: Unappreciated Interest
programme.desc: Dorian pulls an illegal scam involving Frank’s credit card and makes matters worse by lying about it, behavior that could have dramatic consequences.

programme.title: Moesha: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: With Dee sick in bed with a bad cold, Moesha offers to prepare the Thanksgiving feast but finds herself engaged in a fierce cooking competition with Hakeem’s mother.

programme.title: Moesha: To Sleep – Perchance To Dream
programme.desc: Moesha starts having recurring romantic dreams about Hakeem, giving her second thoughts about their friendship and about sharing a room with him and Niecy on an upcoming ski trip.

programme.title: Moesha: He Doth Protest Too Much
programme.desc: Moesha discovers that some of her college classes are more difficult than she thought; she has a hard time in Chemistry and reluctantly agrees to let Niecy tutor her.

programme.title: Moesha: Let’s Talk About Sex
programme.desc: Moesha crashes in Niecy’s dorm room after a late-night Pendulum party and is horrified to discover that Nicey has also let a male sleep in the room.

programme.title: Moesha: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: The arrival of Frank’s Aunt Hattie brings a shocking revelation about Frank that turns the rest of the family – especially Dorian and Moesha – against him.

programme.title: Moesha: Color Him Father
programme.desc: Still reeling from the news that Frank is Dorian’s biological father, the Mitchells prepare for Dorian’s 17th birthday bash, a party that grows more and more elaborate and expensive as Dorian takes full advantage of Frank’s guilt.

programme.title: Moesha: Family Affair
programme.desc: Still angry at Frank for keeping his true relationship to Dorian a secret for so long, Moesha decides not to introduce her father at an upcoming 'Businessman of the Year' awards banquet.

programme.title: Moesha: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Hoping to boost the confidence of her new roommate, Theresa, Moesha asks Hakeem’s good-looking friend to ask Theresa on a date – but can’t leave well enough alone when the date is a success.

programme.title: Moesha: Gimme A Break
programme.desc: Moesha, Niecy, and Hakeem go to Santa Barbara for Spring Break. A campus rival spreads false information that Mo is 'easy' when her ex-boyfriend shows interest in Moesha.

programme.title: Moesha: Something About Moesha
programme.desc: Having been neighbors and friends nearly all their lives, Moesha and Hakeem wonder if there is more to their relationship.

programme.title: Moesha: The Robbing Hood
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem explore their evolving dating relationship. Dorian visits Moesha on campus and Moesha sees this as a chance to forge a sister/brother relationship; items begin missing from dorm rooms and all clues lead towards Dorian.

programme.title: Moesha: Arriving Right On Q
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem’s relationship hits a snag when Q returns to town; sparks fly between Moesha and Q; Q invites Moesha to spend the summer (as a road manager) on tour with his rap group.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: East Midlands
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are back and busier than ever, as they attempt to find homes for two sets of house hunters with very different needs in an extremely challenging market.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Northside
programme.desc: Kirstie's house hunter is London born and bred and has viewed a whopping 90 properties already-whilst Phil's couple have yet to view a single place and have no idea where to buy.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Revisit: Hastings
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil revisit two couples in Hastings, Jakki and Scott, and newlyweds Nicola and Chris, only to find that one couple is now in a very different place.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Guildford
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Surrey on a quest to find dream homes for two sets of frustrated house hunters. Two very different budgets and briefs but with the property market raging it looks like they've taken on double the trouble.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week, we're back in Yorkshire catching up with lotto millionaires Roger and Lara Griffiths. Just over a year ago, this lucky pair scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and were desperate to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Warwickshire
programme.desc: It's like Doctor Dolittle meets Lawrence of Arabia as Kirstie and Phil help the camel-racing Fossett clan relocate their ever-expanding menagerie of children and wild beasts.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Sutton Coldfield
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are kicking-off the series with one hell of a challenge, they're in Birmingham, house hunting for three generations of one family… one big house, for one big, extended family.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Southside
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are searching in South London with three essential workers who need all the help they can get. They're all new to the area, have very modest budgets, and want to find their dream first homes.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bucks & Aberdeen Revisit
programme.desc: In Buckinghamshire, Emma and Andrew had been looking for the ideal family home, whilst in Aberdeenshire Karen and Russell needed to cut down their daily commute.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Aberdeenshire
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Scotland bringing their property-finding mission to the granite city-Aberdeen. Both sets of house hunters have relocated here for work, both are looking for family homes-and both want to find them quickly.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Tufnell Park
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil almost come to blows when they take on the impossible – finding a flat with private parking in pricey North London for £290,000. They're helping Laura Cream, a very single-minded young lady.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: St Albans
programme.desc: Searching in prime commuter territory where property isn't cheap. Both couples have high expectations for their first homes and our duo will need all of their property know-how to come out on top!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire & Guildford
programme.desc: After winning one point eight million on the lottery, they needed a new house.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Derbyshire
programme.desc: This week Phil and Kirstie are searching in Derbyshire, where their first couple Bryone & Daniel Burton have moved from London, along with daughter Ruby.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Buckinghamshire
programme.desc: Just a stone's throw from London, Buckinghamshire is the ideal location for two couples trying to combine high flying careers in the City, with the peace and quiet of small-town life for their young families.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Wiltshire
programme.desc: One couple want room for 4 children and a 4x4 business -whilst the other want a place that will 'give them a big hug' whenever they walk through the door!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: North Surrey
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil take charge of property searches for 2 couples who hope to relocate to the leafy streets of beautiful Surrey –one of the most expensive counties in the country.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Surrey
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Surrey - and at opposite ends of the property ladder.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Aberdeen City
programme.desc: Newlyweds Emma and Mike are bursting to move on and up.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Brighton, Sussex
programme.desc: A first-time buyer after a perfect pad near the Brighton hot spots and a couple who know exactly what they like-and exactly what they don't...

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bristol
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil come to the aid of newly qualified doctor Ian Ensum, as he takes his first steps on the property ladder.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Final Dessert
programme.desc: It's dessert day in the finals of Great British Menu and the last chance for the competing chefs to impress the judges and secure a place at the final banquet - a celebration of the very best local produce from across the land.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Banquet
programme.desc: The winners have been announced and this special documentary follows the successful chefs in the run-up to the banquet, as they make the painstaking preparations, for what is one of the most important meals they will ever cook.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Homecoming
programme.desc: Blake secures the release of Krystle and Alexis, and the families return from Moldavia; Luke is buried; Rita's boyfriend Joel is anxious to help Sammy Jo further her scheme; Alexis is preoccupied with Galen's welfare; Fallon tells Miles she has amnesia.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Gown
programme.desc: Alexis learns Galen is alive in Moldavia; Jeff plans to move to California; Adam and Claudia are married; Krystle pays a surprise visit to Sammy Jo and spots her double, Rita.

programme.desc: Dex orchestrates a dramatic rescue in Moldavia; Jeff discovers a clue to Fallon's whereabouts; Little Blake realizes Rita is not Krystle; Dominique places a mysterious overseas call.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Proposal
programme.desc: After reaching safety, a paralyzed King Galen is hospitalized; Joel poses as a doctor to gain entry to the mansion; Claudia inherits and oil well; Rita drugs Blake; Galen makes Alexis a powerful promise from his hospital bed.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Close Call
programme.desc: Sammy Jo panics at Blake's possible discovery of Krystle's captivity; Claudia plots with Adam to ger her oil well back; Galen promises to make Alexis a pwerful woman as he attempts to regain the throne.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Quarrels

programme.title: Dynasty: The Roadhouse
programme.desc: Joel tells Rita that she must sleep with Blake; Joel and the real Krystle are seen together at a roadhouse; Galen sends Michael to New York for help; Adam offers Bart Fallmont a bribe to insure the pipeline's success.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Solution
programme.desc: When Blake threatens divorce, Rita takes drastic action; Galen hides his recovery as he plots to regain the throne; Jonathan accepts a position with Bart Fallmont; Amanda receives a foreboding sign about Michael.

programme.title: Dynasty: Suspicions
programme.desc: Blake receives the fatal dose of poison; Sammy Jo discovers a suspicious vial; Krystle attempts two deceptive escapes; a fist-fight breaks out over the pipeline; Dex battles for construction rights; Alexis receives a call from a stranger.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Alarm
programme.desc: Galen plots his comeback; Alexis' long-lost sister appears; Joel and Rita plan their final move; Blake's life is in danger.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Vigil
programme.desc: Sammy Jo panics at Blake's possible discovery of Krystle's captivity; Claudia plots with Adam to get her oil well back; Galen promises to make Alexis a powerful woman as he attempts to regain the throne.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Accident
programme.desc: Krystle poses as Rita and escapes; Joel and Rita crash over a cliff; Alexis plots Krystle's demise; Dex confronts Galen.

programme.title: Dynasty: Souvenirs
programme.desc: A slanderous reporter causes Krystle's emotional breakdown; Fallon returns home concealing a disturbing secret; Amanda decides to divorce Michael; Dex and Amanda spend the night together; Alexis learns of her sister's release.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Divorce
programme.desc: Alexis finds Amanda and Dex in bed together; Krystle turns the tables on Alexis; Adam looks into Bart Fallmont's past.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Uzo Aduba
programme.desc: Uzo Aduba joins Bear on a harrowing journey to Spain's Pyrenees Mountains, where they face a poisonous viper and secure a dinner of field mice; Uzo shares the story of her path to fame and her family's emigration from Nigeria.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Scott Eastwood
programme.desc: Actor Scott Eastwood joins Bear on a journey through the harsh Bulgarian outback; the duo rappel from a towering arch, cross a raging river, descend into a dark cave and face off against a snake; Scott details growing up with his famous father.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Mel B
programme.desc: Spice Girl Mel B joins Bear on the two hundred foot cliffs of the Welsh coastline, where a final descent sends Mel into breakdown mode; Bear is stung by a jellyfish, forcing Mel to practice some first aid skills.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, James Marsden
programme.desc: X-man' James Marsden joins Bear on an adventure into the heart Rattle Snake Canyon in Utah, where they helicopter on to one of the highest arches in the area.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Courtney Cox
programme.desc: Actress Courteney Cox joins Bear to challenge herself into sharp edged discomfort amidst the jagged peaks and descending cliffs on the windswept coast of Ireland.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, President Barack Obama
programme.desc: President Barack Obama and Bear Grylls explore the Alaskan wilderness, where they observe evidence of climate change, sample wild salmon and catkins tea made with water from melting glaciers; Obama discusses his official duties, parenthood and faith.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Sterling K. Brown
programme.desc: Actor Sterling K. Brown joins Bear in the high mountains of Colorado, where they battle plummeting temperatures while descending a sheer rock face, track an elusive deer and rappel down a waterfall.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Deon Sanders
programme.desc: Bear Grylls takes NFL hall of famer Deion Sanders to the mesas and canyons of Utah for his first ever camping trip.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Kate Hudson
programme.desc: Oscar-nominated actress Kate Hudson goes on a journey with Bear that involves a treacherous mountain range in Italy; Kate shares details of her unique upbringing.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Kate Winslett
programme.desc: Acclaimed movie star Kate Winslet takes a role like never before, as Bear paramotors them both to the top of the Snowdonia Mountains in Wales.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ben Stiller
programme.desc: Ben Stiller travels to Northern Scotland to face the Isle of Skye's rugged mountains. Stiller discusses his background while they navigate slippery terrain, searching for food and clean water.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Jesse Tyler Ferguson
programme.desc: Actor Jesse Tyler Ferguson joins Bear on a 6,000-foot descent along the cliffs and ridges of Croda dei Toni; Ferguson shares insight about his sudden rise to fame.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Roger Federer
programme.desc: Bear takes one of the best athletes of all time, Roger Federer, on a daring adventure through the Swiss Alps as they attempt to navigate the tough terrain. They descend a frozen waterfall and use tennis rackets as snowshoes.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Nick Jonas
programme.desc: Renowned survivalist Bear Grylls is accompanied by singer Nick Jonas on another one of his journeys into the wilderness.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Drew Brees
programme.desc: Bear Grylls ventures deep into Panama's Camino de Cruces jungle with Super Bowl winning quarterback Drew Brees, exploring caves and wrestling a six-foot crocodile.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Lindsey Vonn
programme.desc: Bear and Olympic gold medallist Lindsey Vonn take a speedboat trip, then swim to shore and make their way along a rugged coastline; after traversing a deep chasm, they collect a dinner of sea urchins.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Derek Hough
programme.desc: Dancer Derek Hough joins Bear on an adventure across the mountains of Bulgaria; Derek reveals childhood struggles and teaches Bear some dance moves.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Marshawn Lynch
programme.desc: Bear and Super Bowl champion Marshawn Lynch tackle a rugged mountain range that has sharp cliffs and dark chasms; the pair comes face to face with the French Foreign Legion and pursues a wild hog for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Vanessa Hudgens
programme.desc: Bear and Vanessa Hudgens rappel from a helicopter into the high Sierra for a scenic adventure; Bear and Vanessa evade a boulder avalanche, summit a massive dormant volcano, and encounter a rattlesnake; Vanessa talks about her rise to stardom.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Shaquille O'Neal
programme.desc: Bear and NBA legend Shaquille O'Neal are lifted from a freight train via helicopter and whisked away to a dense forest in the remote Adirondacks; they face blood-sucking leeches, and a 200-foot rock face as they search for their exit.
